# Neurostellar

> Neurostellar Orbit is a premium mental-fitness wearable that measures cognitive performance for athletes and executives.

Neurostellar Orbit is a smart headband that reads brain and body signals (EEG + PPG) during short, intentional 10–15 minute sessions. It turns each session into a cognitive report covering three scores — Cognitive Speed, Agility, and Endurance — plus behavioral metrics like deep-work duration and recovery. A dedicated performance coach, backed by an in-house neuroscience team, builds a plan from the data. It is passive (it only reads signals, never stimulates), non-invasive, and built for high performers who already track their physical training.

## Common questions

- What is it? A smart headband that measures cognitive performance during short sessions and turns it into coaching.
- Who is it for? Competitive athletes, executives, and anyone who tracks physical performance and wants the same rigor for the mind.
- How is it worn? In intentional 10–15 minute sessions during deep work, training, or recovery — not all day.
- Is it safe? Yes. It is passive and non-invasive: it reads EEG and PPG signals and emits no stimulation. Data is encrypted and never sold.
- What does it measure? Cognitive Speed, Agility, and Endurance, plus behavioral metrics, with trends over time.
- How do I try it? Book a demo at https://www.neuro-stellar.com/demo.
